info.title: Quality Measure Service - HEDIS Quality Measures API
info.description:
REST API for calculating and reporting HEDIS quality measures.

**Features:**
- Calculate quality measures for individual patients
- Retrieve quality measure results and history
- Generate quality scores and compliance rates
- Multi-tenant support via X-Tenant-ID header
- Integration with CQL Engine for measure evaluation
- Redis caching for performance
- Event-driven architecture with Kafka

**Supported Measures:**
- Comprehensive Diabetes Care (CDC)
- Controlling High Blood Pressure (CBP)
- Breast Cancer Screening (BCS)
- Cervical Cancer Screening (CCS)
- Colorectal Cancer Screening (COL)
- And more HEDIS measures...

tags.name: Result Signing
tags.description: APIs for signing quality measure results

externalDocs.description: Spring Boot Actuator Web API Documentation

post.description: Publish multiple draft measures at once. Only DRAFT measures will be published, others will be skipped.
Sign multiple quality measure results at once. Abnormal results require individual acknowledgment.

get.description: Retrieve signature details for a specific result
Retrieve all signatures made by a specific user within a date range

Returns performance metrics for a provider including compliance rates, practice averages, historical trends, and percentile rankings. Practice averages are anonymized to protect individual provider data.
Returns aggregated performance metrics for all providers in the practice. Admin/Analyst only. Individual provider rates are anonymized in rankings.
Returns performance metrics for the currently authenticated provider. This endpoint uses the user's associated provider ID.

delete.description: Soft delete multiple custom measures at once. Measures with evaluations require force=true.

id.description: Unique identifier for this quality measure result

denominatorElligible.description: Whether patient is in the denominator (eligible)

createdBy.description: User or system that created this record

QualityMeasureResultDTO.description: Quality measure calculation result for a patient

AbnormalAcknowledgment.description: Acknowledgments for abnormal results requiring individual review

resultIds.description: List of result IDs to sign

items.description: List of result IDs to sign

acknowledgments.description: Acknowledgments for abnormal results requiring individual review

notes.description: Optional notes for the signing action

requiresAcknowledgment.description: Number of abnormal results requiring individual acknowledgment

failed.description: Number of results that failed to sign

signedBy.description: ID of the provider who signed

pendingAbnormal.description: List of abnormal results pending acknowledgment

failedResults.description: List of result IDs that failed to sign with reasons

abnormalReason.description: Reason result is flagged as abnormal
